title: "podman input" on a gitlab runner trigger a SIGSERV
body:
### Issue Description

"podman load" as well a "podman push" for a tar, running in a CI job running on a Gitlab runner (Docker executor) trigger a SIGSERV. the image used in quay.io/podman/stable:v4 (sha256:31c93e724f9ec610848763db0c791dbbe0e83696fbe09ecdc34702e440958e2f)

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1.
2.
3.

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.

I think this is the same as https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/20908

Please try with podman 4.9.1 or newer
